name: maven-run-configurations
description: IntelliJ-style Maven run configurations in the bottom panel for Cursor/VS Code.

mavenRunConfigs.defaultJavaHome.description: Path to JDK/JRE (JAVA_HOME) when a run configuration has no Java override. macOS: .jdk bundle ok. Linux/Windows: folder that contains bin/java (or bin\java.exe).
mavenRunConfigs.defaultJavaHome.markdownDescription:
Path to JDK/JRE (**JAVA_HOME**) when a run configuration has no Java override.

**macOS:** Prefer the JDK **bundle folder** (e.g. `…/jdk-11.jdk` under `/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/`). The extension resolves `Contents/Home` when needed.

**Linux:** The directory that contains **`bin/java`** (often under `/usr/lib/jvm/`, e.g. `java-17-openjdk-amd64`; exact names vary by distro/package).

**Windows:** The JDK **root** that contains **`bin\java.exe`** (e.g. `C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17` or `C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.x-hotspot`). Do not point only at `bin`.

[Open dialog: text + Browse…](command:mavenRunConfigs.openGlobalDefaultsPanel) (same layout as run configuration overrides).

[Browse only](command:mavenRunConfigs.pickDefaultJavaHome)

mavenRunConfigs.defaultMavenHome.description: Maven install root (MAVEN_HOME): folder with bin/mvn (or bin/mvn.cmd). No auto-detection like macOS JDK—use the unpacked archive root (e.g. …/apache-maven-3.8.8).
mavenRunConfigs.defaultMavenHome.markdownDescription:
Apache Maven **install root** (`MAVEN_HOME` / `M2_HOME`): the directory that contains **`bin/mvn`** (macOS/Linux) or **`bin/mvn.cmd`** (Windows).

**How the extension uses it:** the path is **`path.resolve`’d** as you typed it, then it checks that **`bin/mvn`** (or **`mvn.cmd`**) exists. There is **no** parent/subfolder guessing and **no** macOS-style rewrite (unlike `defaultJavaHome` + `.jdk` / `Contents/Home`).

**Typical layout:** unpacked binary archive—the folder that lists **`bin`**, **`conf`**, **`lib`** (e.g. `…/Tools/apache-maven-3.8.8` or `…/apache-maven-3.9.6`). **Do not** set this to `bin` alone.

**Examples:** `…/Development/Tools/apache-maven-3.8.8`; Linux e.g. `/opt/apache-maven-3.9.6` or distro layout under `/usr/share/maven` **only if** `bin/mvn` lives there; Windows e.g. `C:\Tools\apache-maven-3.9.6`.

[Open dialog: text + Browse…](command:mavenRunConfigs.openGlobalDefaultsPanel) (same layout as run configuration overrides).

[Browse only](command:mavenRunConfigs.pickDefaultMavenHome)

author: Siegfried-Thor Bolz
